description_long: This is an adult woman standing with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose, suitable for digital urban environments. She is wearing a sleeveless, knee-length dress with a fitted waistband and a collared neckline, featuring two prominent front pockets. The dress is paired with a sleeveless undershirt or blouse, and she is wearing flat, closed-toe shoes. Her hair is styled in a medium-length ponytail, and her facial features are clearly defined. The overall appearance is neat and casual, appropriate for everyday city life. No accessories or carried objects are visible.
description: An adult woman in a sleeveless, belted dress and flats, standing in a T-pose with a ponytail hairstyle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the collared dress, front pockets, and facial features with arms extended.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the dress, arm, and ponytail.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the back of the dress, waistband, and ponytail.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the side profile, arm, and hair tied back.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless belted dress with collared neckline and front pockets
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
